title: 2025 06 29 Uclamphmissiondraft
html:
TL;DR

  • Multi-draft Google Doc Yahir was helping a friend (a first-generation Latina applying to UCLA's MPH in Community Health Sciences) revise — drafts 1 through 5, plus "jacoby suggestions" and "yahir suggestions" sections.
  • Personal narrative: rural-Oregon childhood watching father's untreated SUD compounded by language barriers and culturally-incompetent care; mother as DV survivor constrained by machismo; family had to seek SUD rehab in Mexico.
  • Academic arc: undergraduate Family and Human Services + Prevention Science + Global Health minor; research intern with the 90by30 initiative (Lane County, Oregon — reduce child abuse 90% by 2030).
  • Current role at time of writing: Prevention Specialist at the Koreatown Youth and Community Center (KYCC) working substance-use prevention and greenspace-access advocacy in Westlake / MacArthur Park, Los Angeles.
  • Stated career outcomes: Violence Prevention & Intervention Specialist, Health Disparities Researcher, or Behavioral Health Coordinator — community-based work for immigrant women and minority families.

Notes

This sits in Yahir's vault because he was acting as outside reader / editor — typical of how he supports close friends through high-stakes application writing. The five-draft progression shows a clean arc: each iteration tightens the rural-Oregon → metro-LA narrative bridge, adds the MacArthur Park specificity, and (by draft 5) names concrete career roles instead of abstract aspirations.

The "yahir suggestions" section near the bottom contains the prompt-spec restated cleanly ("Why public health? Why this concentration? Why UCLA? Career goals — 1500 words max") suggesting Yahir's edit was structural: get the four prompt beats hit explicitly.

The friend's specific rural-Latina → metro-LA bridge is the unique angle of the essay — most MPH applicants have one or the other, not both. The 90by30 + KYCC pairing also gives prevention-work continuity that admissions reviewers reward.

Author identity intentionally not stubbed here — single-doc third-party identifying detail; queue to potential entities only if she surfaces in a later note under a clear name.

Connections

  • ucla — target school
  • koreatown youth and community center — current employer
  • oregon — origin context
  • debt of gratitude — the editorial-help-for-friends pattern
  • asking the right question — Yahir's editor-as-prompt-restater move
